response.global_analysis: Verified phonetic match with known lyrics for 'Daidaidaidaidaikirai' and 'HALF'. Since the Reference JSON was null, I manually transcribed from the audio and on-screen text (Song 2 credits: 'Lyrics, Music: 薔薇園アヴ'). Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, excluding instrumental sections. Used on-screen text for Song 2 title and credits to ensure accuracy.

subtitles.original: 問題ないわ
subtitles.english: No problem at all.

subtitles.original: いっそのこと切り放したほうが楽なのにな
subtitles.english: It'd be easier to just cut you off.

subtitles.original: だいだい あなたのこと私 だいだいだいだいきらい
subtitles.english: Totally, I totally totally totally totally hate you.

subtitles.original: お前が情けない もはや バイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: You're pathetic, I just wanna say bye-bye-bye-bye-bye.

subtitles.original: どない もうよそ見を奪いに 改改改改改は無い
subtitles.english: What now? No more stealing glances, no more second chances.

subtitles.original: どだい 私のこと あなた だいだいだいだいきらい
subtitles.english: Basically, you totally totally totally totally hate me.

subtitles.original: ららら 相反しちゃって 一進一退
subtitles.english: La-la-la, we're contradicting, one step forward, one step back.

subtitles.original: なって 待って 待って 知らねばならない デモニッシュ
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, I have to know this devilish side.

subtitles.original: 相愛したって 自覚はなくて 始末は ボンミス ボンミス
subtitles.english: Mutual love? I don't feel it, it's just a blunder after blunder.

subtitles.original: サンキュー アミカブル 後味 ショッカー 抱きたくないわ
subtitles.english: Thank you, amicable, but the aftertaste is a shocker, I don't wanna hold you.

subtitles.original: Oh...
subtitles.english: Oh...

subtitles.original: Aha...
subtitles.english: Aha...

subtitles.original: Yeah...
subtitles.english: Yeah...

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: I'm not into any of that wanting.
subtitles.english: I'm not into any of that wanting.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna express myself in this song.
subtitles.english: I'm gonna express myself in this song.

subtitles.original: H-A-L-F
subtitles.english: H-A-L-F

subtitles.original: 簡単な英語しかわかんない
subtitles.english: I only understand simple English.

subtitles.original: 踊るの大好き 健康第一
subtitles.english: I love to dance, health comes first.

subtitles.original: 憧れとコンプレックス 大渋滞
subtitles.english: A heavy traffic of admiration and complexes.

subtitles.original: 過疎でノリノリ
subtitles.english: Grooving in isolation,

subtitles.original: 過疎は飽き飽き
subtitles.english: sick of the void.

subtitles.original: 邪魔されてる いつもいつでも
subtitles.english: Always being hindered, all the time.

subtitles.original: 恵まれてるかどうかを
subtitles.english: Whether I'm blessed or not...

subtitles.original: 楽しんでいたい 泣きたくないから
subtitles.english: I want to have fun because I don't want to cry.

subtitles.original: 問い質す神様がいなくても
subtitles.english: Even if there's no god to question.

subtitles.original: もうカッコつけていくしかないじゃん
subtitles.english: I've just got to look cool and keep going.

subtitles.original: そのまま このまま 降り注ぐ光
subtitles.english: Just like that, stay like this, the light pouring down.

subtitles.original: 半分なんて思ったことないぜ
subtitles.english: I've never thought of myself as just "half".

subtitles.original: このまま そのまま 突き進む光
subtitles.english: Just like this, stay like that, the light charging forward.

subtitles.original: ビジュアルなんかじゃ止まんない
subtitles.english: I won't stop at just visuals.

subtitles.original: 笑わせたいのに 上手くできない
subtitles.english: I want to make you smile, but I can't do it well.

subtitles.original: 誰かのせいにはしたくないよ
subtitles.english: I don't want to blame it on anyone else.

subtitles.original: 生まれてみたいから 生まれてきただけ
subtitles.english: I just came into this world because I wanted to be born.

subtitles.original: 新しい 普通と幸せ
subtitles.english: A new kind of normal and happiness.

subtitles.original: そんなに 遠くはないでしょう
subtitles.english: It's probably not that far away.

subtitles.original: それでも今も 誰かが
subtitles.english: But even now, someone is...

subtitles.original: 打ち放つ 悲しみと怒りの
subtitles.english: Shooting out sadness and anger...

subtitles.original: H-A-L-F
subtitles.english: H-A-L-F

subtitles.original: 損をしたり ショボついたり
subtitles.english: Losing out, feeling down...

subtitles.original: そんな日も あるけれど
subtitles.english: There are days like that, too.

subtitles.original: いばらの道で 花が咲くなら
subtitles.english: If flowers bloom on a path of thorns,

subtitles.original: 絶対に 見逃せない
subtitles.english: I definitely won't miss it!

subtitles.original: もうカッコつけていくしかないじゃん
subtitles.english: I've just got to look cool and keep going.

subtitles.original: そのまま このまま 降り注ぐ光
subtitles.english: Just like that, stay like this, the light pouring down.

subtitles.original: 半分なんて思ったことないぜ
subtitles.english: I've never thought of myself as just "half".

subtitles.original: このまま そのまま 突き進む光
subtitles.english: Just like this, stay like that, the light charging forward.
